overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} z ^ {0} = 1, \qquad z ^ {n + 1} = z ^ {n} z, & \text {if n\geq 0}, \\ z ^ {- n} = (z ^ {- 1}) ^ {n}, & \text {if z\neq 0 and n > 0 .} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l} z ^ {0} = 1, \qquad z ^ {n + 1} = z ^ {n} z, & \text {if } n\geq 0, \\ z ^ {- n} = (z ^ {- 1}) ^ {n}, & \text {if } z\neq 0 \text { and } n > 0 . \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} \text {a) f(x) = x^3 + ax + b,} & x \in \mathbf {R}. \\ \text {b) f(x) = \log (x^2 - 9),} & | x | > 3. \\ \text {c) f(x) = x^{2 / 3} (x - 1)^4,} & 0 \leq x \leq 1. \\ \text {d) f(x) = (\sin x) / x if x\neq 0,f(0) = 1,} & 0 \leq x \leq \pi / 2. \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l} \text {a) } f(x) = x^3 + ax + b, & x \in \mathbf {R}. \\ \text {b) } f(x) = \log (x^2 - 9), & | x | > 3. \\ \text {c) } f(x) = x^{2 / 3} (x - 1)^4, & 0 \leq x \leq 1. \\ \text {d) } f(x) = (\sin x) / x \text { if } x\neq 0, f(0) = 1, & 0 \leq x \leq \pi / 2. \end{array}
